name: API schema extractor and classifier
description: Takes an API documentation URL, scrapes it with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract and classify API endpoints into structured schemas, and saves the results to Google Sheets. Adapted from n8n's API schema extractor workflow.

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping API docs

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving schema

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for extraction results

apiDocsUrl.description: URL of the API documentation to extract (e.g. 'https://api.example.com/docs')

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the schema output

apiName.description: Name of the API for labeling

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for schema extraction
Build Google Sheets rows from extracted schema
Build Slack Block Kit schema report
